title: [release-1.14] Bump ocicrypt and go-jose CVE-2024-28180
body:
Bump github.com/go-jose/go-jose to v3.0.0 and
github.com/containers/ocicrypt to v1.1.10

Addresses: CVE-2024-28180
https://issues.redhat.com/browse/RHEL-28736
https://issues.redhat.com/browse/RHEL-28728
https://issues.redhat.com/browse/OCPBUGS-30723

comments.body: @mtrmac I didn't see that too.  IDK if that also needs to be updated.  I'll check with ProdSec on Monday.

@TomSweeneyRedHat your notes say “go-jose v4.0.1, v3.0.3, and/or v2.6.3”; FWIW `github.com/go-jose/go-jose/v3` and `gopkg.in/go-jose/go-jose.v2` are same package (the import name has changed), compare https://github.com/go-jose/go-jose/security/advisories/GHSA-c5q2-7r4c-mv6g .

The two major versions are both included independently; updating to 3.0.3 does not remove the 2.6.3 implementation.
For the record, the v2 version was updated in #2301.
